name: meetings
description: Hub-centric meeting notes: one Meetings Hub per day at beacon/meetings/hubs/ aggregating individual meeting notes at beacon/meetings/notes/ via inline NewMeetingButton + MeetingsHubCards CustomJS classes. v0.1.1: migrated to v0.4.2 split-field nav-button schema.

post_install.message: Meetings blueprint installed at beacon/meetings/. REQUIRED: enable the Templater community plugin if not already enabled. Click 'Meetings' to open today's meetings hub at beacon/meetings/hubs/YYYY-MM-DD-Meetings.md. From the hub, click 'New Meeting' to create individual meeting notes at beacon/meetings/notes/YYYY/MM-MMMM/YYYY-MM-DD <title>.md (you'll be prompted for title and attendees). Hub renders today's meetings as cards with status badges; meetings also appear in the daily dashboard's Today's Meetings panel.
